title: エンジンに火をつけろ！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This... is a race course... How did I...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My body sounds like a... motorcycle engine!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is awesome! I got power runnin' through my
entire body!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what's goin' on, but I know my running is
gonna be super cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right! Since I'm here, I may as well go for a test
drive!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, Vodka! You can't just jump out and scare
me like that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Scarlet. What happened to my power? My
test drive?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Good grief... Pull yourself together already. Don't tell me you were having another weird dream.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You were all "engine this" and "engine that" while
you were asleep... This is what happens when you
fall asleep reading those motorcycle magazines.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A dream... Yeah. It was all a dream.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I can still feel the sensation! Time to get
straight to trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's running improves thanks to her recent
dream!
